zh.North Meols, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾諾斯 梅奧爾斯
zh.lifeSummary: Alice Winwick是Sir William de Wynwick和Matilda Thornton的女兒，於1191年12月10日出生。她於大約1215年與Alan de Singleton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1269年在英國藍卡爾享年78歲。

zh-hans.North Meols, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾諾斯 梅奧爾斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Winwick是Sir William de Wynwick和Matilda Thornton的女儿，于1191年12月10日出生。她于大约1215年与Alan de Singleton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1269年在英国藍卡爾享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Winwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Winnick
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Winwick in Huntingdonshire, Lancashire, and Northamptonshire. The Huntingdonshire and Northamptonshire placenames derive from the Old English personal name Wina + Old English wīc ‘dwelling, specialized farmstead’. The Lancashire placename derives from an Old English personal name Wineca + Old English wīc.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of Winnik, an occupational name for a wine seller, from Polish wino ‘wine’ + the agent suffix -nik.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Winwick was born on 10 December 1191 as the daughter of Sir William de Wynwick and Matilda Thornton. She married Alan de Singleton about 1215. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1269, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Winwick est née le 10 décembre 1191, fille de Sir William de Wynwick et Matilda Thornton. Elle a épousé Alan de Singleton environ 1215. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1269, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Alice Winwick wurde am 10. Dezember 1191, als Tochter von Sir William de Wynwick und Matilda Thornton geboren. Sie hat um 1215 Alan de Singleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1269 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Alice Winwick è nata il il 10 dicembre 1191 come figlia di Sir William de Wynwick e Matilda Thornton. Lei sposato Alan de Singleton circa 1215. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1269, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Winwickは1191年12月10日にSir William de WynwickとMatilda Thorntonの娘として生まれた。約1215年にAlan de Singletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1269年にイギリスランカシュアイアで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Winwick(은)는 1191년 12월 10일 Sir William de Wynwick(와)과 Matilda Thornton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1215년 Alan de Singleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1269년 영국 랭카실르에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice Winwick nasceu em 10 de dezembro de 1191 filha de Sir William de Wynwick e Matilda Thornton. Ela casou-se com Alan de Singleton aproximadamente 1215. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1269, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Winwick родилась 10 декабря 1191 г. Её родителей звали Sir William de Wynwick и Matilda Thornton. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alan de Singleton около 1215 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1269 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Alice Winwick nació el 10 de diciembre de 1191 como hija de Sir William de Wynwick y Matilda Thornton. Se casó con Alan de Singleton aproximadamente 1215. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1269, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
